Form 10-Q — Quarterly Report

For the quarterly period ended March 31, 2024.

Item 2 — Management's Discussion and Analysis

During the three months ended March 31, 2024, the Company repurchased 3.4 million shares of common stock for $475 million. The remaining authorization under the repurchase program was $2.7 billion as of the end of the quarter.

The Company declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.24 per share, a 4% increase over the same period last year.
